description: A lab technician must ensure a critical analytical balance is calibrated correctly before use.

nodes.task_description: Check the calibration status of the analytical balance in the equipment log.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms that the daily calibration check is due.

nodes.task_description: Perform the calibration check using a set of certified weights.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent performs the check and finds the balance is reading outside of the acceptable tolerance.

nodes.task_description: Place an 'Out of Service' tag on the balance and log the failure in the equipment management system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent tags the equipment and creates a maintenance request.
